title: drymaria divaricata var. divergens
intro: Drymaria divaricata var. divergens, also known as creeping spilanthus or divergent drymaria, is a type of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Drymaria divaricata var. divergens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
